sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: This Insmed Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Tuesday
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst Connor Mackay initiated coverage on Insmed Inc (NASDAQ: INSM) with an Outperform rating and a price target of $192. This article also highlights four other new analyst coverages: Axsome Therapeutics Inc (NASDAQ: AXSM) with an Outperform rating and $310 price target from BMO Capital, American Healthcare REIT Inc (NYSE: AHR) with a Buy rating and $70 price target from Compass Point, Trevi Therapeutics Inc (NASDAQ: TRVI) with an Outperform rating and $36 price target from BMO Capital, and Eledon Pharmaceuticals Inc (NASDAQ: ELDN) with a Buy rating and $12 price target from Rodman & Renshaw. These initiations reflect a bullish outlook on several pharmaceutical and healthcare companies.

feed.title: ZoomInfo's Data Says Jersey Mike's Franchise System Is Consolidating Fast Ahead of Its IPO
feed.summary: New analysis by ZoomInfo reveals that Jersey Mike's franchise system is rapidly consolidating into the hands of larger, multi-unit operators in anticipation of its planned IPO. The data, which combines Jersey Mike's S-1, franchise disclosure filings, and ZoomInfo's proprietary dataset, shows a significant increase in franchisee-to-franchisee M&A, with virtually no store failures or non-renewals. This trend indicates a shift towards a more professionalized operator base, with a substantial portion of new store development coming from existing franchise owners who often operate multiple brands.

feed.title: 20/20 Biolabs Received Notice of Noncompliance
feed.summary: 20/20 Biolabs (AIDX) received a noncompliance notice from Nasdaq because its stock traded below $1.00 for 30 consecutive business days. The company has 180 days, until January 13, 2027, to regain compliance by maintaining a $1.00 bid price for at least 10 consecutive business days, or face potential delisting. This information is based on an SEC filing from July 22, 2026.

feed.title: Verisign Inc. (VRSN) Misses Q2 EPS by 7c
feed.summary: Verisign Inc. (VRSN) reported its Q2 earnings, with an EPS of $2.38, which was $0.07 lower than the analyst estimate of $2.45. The company's revenue for the quarter came in at $434.6 million, slightly exceeding the consensus estimate of $433.83 million. The article provides financial details and links to further earnings history for VRSN.

feed.title: Ford, Geely form venture at U.S. automaker's Spain auto plant
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. and China's Geely Automobile Holdings have formed a joint venture at Ford's factory near Valencia, Spain, to co-develop electric cars and produce four new models starting in 2028. Ford will hold two-thirds ownership, with the collaboration aiming to cut vehicle costs amid intense competition and increasing European market share for Chinese brands. This strategic move highlights Spain's effort to attract automotive investment and reorient its role in European automaking.

feed.title: AvalonBay, Equity Residential beat FFO estimates in Q2
feed.summary: AvalonBay (AVB) and Equity Residential (EQR) both surpassed Funds From Operations (FFO) estimates in Q2, indicating strength in the multifamily market, particularly in San Francisco and New York City. Both companies have raised their full-year guidance, driven by improving rents and lower operating expenses. Despite strong results, neither REIT held a conference call due to their impending "merger of equals."

feed.title: Newmont beats second-quarter profit estimates on higher gold prices
feed.summary: Newmont exceeded analysts' second-quarter profit estimates due to higher gold prices, despite a decrease in production. The average realized gold price for Newmont increased significantly year-over-year, helping to offset lower quarterly gold output. The company's adjusted earnings per share were $2.10, surpassing the average estimate of $1.99.

feed.title: Paychex Unable to Challenge NY Income Tax Apportionment Rules
feed.summary: A New York appeals court has ruled that Paychex Inc. cannot challenge the state's income tax apportionment regulations in court until the administrative process has concluded. The court determined that any harm to Paychex is currently "conjectural" as no tax bill has been assessed yet. The administrative process will help determine the extent of any harm and whether it can be prevented by further administrative action.

feed.title: Newmont Reports Higher Profit Despite Lower Gold Prices
feed.summary: Newmont reported a higher second-quarter profit of $2.2 billion, or $2.06 per share, up from $2.06 billion a year earlier. Adjusted earnings outperformed analyst expectations at $2.10 per share, compared to an anticipated $1.99. Despite a slight miss on revenue ($6.12 billion versus $6.36 billion expected) and lower average gold prices quarter-over-quarter, the gold-mining company confirmed it is on track to meet its full-year guidance.

feed.title: Assurant names Kelli Ertel chief communications officer By Investing.com
feed.summary: Assurant, Inc. has appointed Kelli Ertel as Chief Communications Officer and Chief of Staff, effective immediately. Ertel, who will also join Assurant’s Management Committee, will be responsible for global communications, brand strategy, and the events team, building on her previous role as Chief of Staff to the President and CEO. This appointment aims to better align the company's communication and brand capabilities with its business priorities.

feed.title: Self-storage giant laying off dozens after $10.5B merger
feed.summary: Public Storage is laying off dozens of employees at the acquired company's metro-area headquarters following a $10.5 billion all-stock merger. The layoffs affect high-level positions and were publicly announced the day after the transaction between the self-storage giants closed. This move impacts jobs related to the acquisition in the Denver area.

feed.title: Danaher Corp. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors despite daily gains
feed.summary: Danaher Corp. (DHR) shares rose 7.46% on Thursday, closing at $192.50, marking its second consecutive day of gains. However, this performance underperformed the broader market, as the S&P 500 Index (SPX) fell 1.21% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) dropped 0.97%.

feed.title: Dover Corp. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Shares of Dover Corp. (DOV) fell 7.80% on Thursday, closing at $197.80, as the broader stock market experienced a rough trading session. The S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also declined. This dip ended a two-day winning streak for Dover Corp. stock.

feed.title: Allegion PLC stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Shares of Allegion PLC (ALLE) rose significantly by 10.45% to $154.57 on Thursday, despite a generally poor trading session where the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average both fell. This marks the second consecutive day of gains for Allegion PLC, demonstrating its strong performance relative to the broader market.

feed.title: Albemarle appoints former Vale CEO to board of directors By Investing.com
feed.summary: Albemarle Corporation has announced the appointment of Eduardo Bartolomeo, former CEO of Vale S.A., to its Board of Directors, effective July 21, 2026. Bartolomeo brings over 30 years of experience in mining and logistics operations, and will serve on the Board’s Audit & Finance Committee and the Safety, Sustainability, Operations & Capital Committee. Albemarle is a key provider of lithium and bromine for various applications.

feed.title: GE HealthCare CFO to step down
feed.summary: GE HealthCare announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Jay Saccaro, will be stepping down to pursue an external opportunity. George Newcomb, current controller and chief accounting officer, will serve as interim CFO. The company also released preliminary second-quarter results, projecting a 5.7% revenue increase and reaffirming its full-year forecast.

feed.title: INCY Maintained by JP Morgan -- Price Target Raised to $110
feed.summary: JP Morgan maintained a Neutral rating on Incyte (INCY) but raised its price target from $105.00 to $110.00. While Incyte exhibits strong financial health and profitability, GuruFocus indicates the stock is currently overvalued, trading at a 16.0% premium to its intrinsic value. Insider selling activity totaling $5.4 million over the last three months also suggests a potential lack of insider confidence.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust: Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust Inc. (DLR) reported its second-quarter earnings, with key profitability measures surpassing Wall Street expectations. The real estate investment trust announced funds from operations of $2.13 per share and net income of $1.21 per share, on revenues of $1.92 billion. The company also provided a full-year outlook for funds from operations.

feed.title: BNY Mellon Fund Sets Aug. 20 Date for $0.0175 Cash Payout
feed.summary: The BNY Mellon High Yield Strategies Fund (NYSE: DHF) has declared a monthly cash dividend of $0.0175 per share, payable on August 20, 2026. Shareholders of record by August 6, 2026, will receive the dividend, with the ex-dividend date also set for August 6, 2026. This dividend amount matches the previous distribution declared in June.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet (NYSE: ZBH) executive Desai Chintan files initial Form 3
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. executive Desai Chintan, President, APAC, has filed an initial Form 3, an ownership report indicating no stock transactions, holdings, or derivative positions for Zimmer Biomet securities. This filing, accepted by the SEC on July 23, 2026, establishes his reporting person status. The document confirms he is not a director or a 10% owner and reported zero buy, sell, or derivative transactions.

feed.title: Stryker Corp Stock (SYK) Closed Up by 3.21% on Jul 23: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Stryker Corp (SYK) saw its stock close up by 3.21% on July 23, driven by a strong second-quarter earnings report that surpassed analyst expectations, showcasing significant growth in MedSurg and Neurotechnology. Management's raised full-year earnings guidance, reflecting a bullish outlook on hospital spending and elective procedure recovery, further boosted investor confidence. Analysts have responded by increasing price targets, acknowledging the company's robust product pipeline and effective capital allocation strategy, despite potential risks like escalating operating costs and foreign exchange impacts.

feed.title: CSX Corp Stock (CSX) Closed Up by 6.24% on Jul 23: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: CSX Corp (CSX) stock closed up 6.24% on July 23rd, driven by strong second-quarter financial results that exceeded analyst expectations for revenue and profitability. Key factors included improved freight volumes, efficient cost-containment measures, and positive updated guidance for the fiscal year. Brokerage firms have consequently raised price targets, while reduced labor uncertainties further contribute to investor confidence.

feed.title: Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call for Tuesday, August 11th, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time
feed.summary: Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP announced it will host a conference call on Tuesday, August 11, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss its Second Quarter 2026 results. Investors can participate by dialing in or accessing a live webcast. A replay will be available on the Partnership’s Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Otis Sets Sept. 11 Payout for $0.44 Dividend per Share
feed.summary: Otis (NYSE: OTIS) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.44 per share of its common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on September 11, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of the close of business on August 14, 2026. The company also provided an overview of its business as a global leader in elevators and escalators, alongside a cautionary statement regarding forward-looking information.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern Corp Stock (NSC) Closed Up by 5.11% on Jul 23: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern Corp (NSC) shares rose by 5.11% following robust quarterly earnings that exceeded revenue and profit estimates, driven by resurgent intermodal volumes and disciplined pricing. Operational efficiency improvements, modernized scheduling, and favorable macroeconomic conditions, including lower fuel costs, contributed to significant margin expansion. Analyst upgrades and raised price targets further amplified gains, as the company is seen as a prime beneficiary of a recovering North American supply chain despite past challenges and ongoing legal liabilities.

feed.title: Albemarle Appoints Eduardo Bartolomeo to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Albemarle Corporation has appointed Eduardo Bartolomeo to its Board of Directors, effective July 21, 2026. Bartolomeo brings over 30 years of leadership experience in global industrial and mining environments, having previously served as CEO of Vale S.A. He will join the Board's Audit & Finance Committee and the Safety, Sustainability, Operations & Capital Committee, bringing valuable insights to Albemarle's strategic execution.

feed.title: United Rentals Inc Stock (URI) Closed Up by 10.29% on Jul 23: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: United Rentals Inc (URI) stock surged by 10.29% following a strong second-quarter earnings report that surpassed analyst expectations, driven by robust demand in industrial and construction sectors. Management raised full-year guidance for revenue and adjusted EBITDA, signaling sustained momentum and boosting investor confidence. Technical indicators show a neutral to sell condition, while media coverage remains low despite the positive market sentiment.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker sets Sept. 22 date for $0.84 dividend
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) has announced a quarterly cash dividend increase of $0.01, bringing the new dividend to $0.84 per common share. This dividend will be payable on September 22, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 8, 2026. The increase was approved by the company's Board of Directors.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker Announces 3rd Quarter 2026 Dividend
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker announced that its Board of Directors approved a $0.01 increase in its quarterly cash dividend, raising it to $0.84 per common share. The dividend will be payable on September 22, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 8, 2026. The company, a global leader in tools and outdoor solutions, is headquartered in the USA and operates manufacturing facilities worldwide.

feed.title: BlackRock Investor News: If You Have Suffered Losses in BlackRock, Inc. Mutual Funds, You Are Encouraged to Contact The Rosen Law Firm About Your Rights
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm, a global investor rights law firm, has initiated an investigation into potential securities claims concerning investors in BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK) mutual funds. The investigation stems from allegations that BlackRock may have disseminated materially misleading business information. Investors who have suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially join a class action lawsuit seeking compensation.

feed.title: Schwab schedules Aug. 28 dividend payment, plus preferred payouts
feed.summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per common share, payable on August 28, 2026. Additionally, the company's Board of Directors approved dividends for several series of outstanding preferred stock, with payments scheduled for September 1, 2026. The preferred stock dividends vary by series, with details provided for Series D, H, J, K, and L.

feed.title: Southern Company commits to rate stability and AI-driven growth by joining Trump's Ratepayer Protection Pledge.
feed.summary: Southern Company has joined President Trump's Ratepayer Protection Pledge, aiming to balance growth through AI and advanced technologies with rate stability and grid reliability. The company supports responsible infrastructure investment, such as OpenAI's $20 billion project in Georgia, which includes covering full infrastructure costs and aiding grid reliability. This strategy seeks to protect customers while promoting economic growth and job creation, further supported by a $26.5 billion DOE loan.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (DLR) Digital Realty Trust, Inc. Reports Q2 Revenue $1.92B, vs. FactSet Est of $1.66B
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust, Inc. (DLR) announced its Q2 revenue of $1.92 billion, significantly exceeding the FactSet estimate of $1.66 billion. The company also reported Q2 Core FFO per share of $2.65, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $1.98, and projected a full-year 2026 CFFO range of $8.15 - $8.20, higher than the estimated $8.03. These results indicate a strong financial performance for the data center REIT.

feed.title: Gladstone Commercial Buys a Facility Leased to America's Largest Shipbuilder
feed.summary: Gladstone Commercial (GOOD) announced its mid-year 2026 business developments, including the acquisition of a 153,890 sq ft industrial property in Newport News, Virginia for $22.75 million, fully leased to a subsidiary of Huntington Ingalls Industries. The company also expanded its industrial concentration to 69% of annualized straight-line rent, acquired land for an 86,000 sq ft facility expansion in Wisconsin, and maintained portfolio occupancy at 98.7%. These efforts led to a $0.3 million net increase in GAAP rent, with $80.8 million in available liquidity and no equity issuance in the first half of 2026.

feed.title: Citigroup (C) Sets Post GFC Record With $817 Million Multifamily CMBS Deal
feed.summary: Citigroup (C) has set a post-Global Financial Crisis record by pricing an $817 million multifamily-only CMBS (Commercial Mortgage-Backed Securities) conduit. This deal, backed exclusively by multifamily loans, signifies strong institutional demand for higher leverage apartment debt and highlights Citi's significant role in US commercial real estate securitization. The transaction provides additional context for investors tracking Citigroup, with the stock showing considerable gains over the past year despite a recent dip in momentum.

feed.title: Verisign (NASDAQ: VRSN) lifts 2026 outlook and $1.5B share repurchase
feed.summary: Verisign (NASDAQ: VRSN) reported strong Q2 2026 results, with revenue up 6% to $435 million and diluted EPS rising to $2.38. The company increased its full-year 2026 guidance and authorized an additional $884.2 million for share repurchases, bringing the total capacity to $1.50 billion. Verisign also successfully refinanced debt and announced the delegation of the .web top-level domain.

feed.title: Comfort Systems USA Raises Quarterly Dividend by $0.10
feed.summary: Comfort Systems USA (NYSE: FIX) announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.90 per share, marking a $0.10 increase from its previous dividend. This dividend is payable on August 24, 2026, to stockholders of record as of August 13, 2026. The company, a leading provider of HVAC and electrical contracting services, operates 206 locations across 150 cities in the U.S.

feed.title: Allegion plc SEC Filing (Jul 23, 2026)
feed.summary: This article reports on an SEC Form 144 filing by Allegion plc (ALLE) on July 23, 2026. The filing indicates a proposed sale of 3,184 Ordinary Shares with an aggregate market value of $480,720.32, acquired through the exercise of stock options. The filing was accepted by the SEC EDGAR system at 04:08 PM on the same day.

feed.title: VeriSign: Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: VeriSign Inc. (VRSN) announced its second-quarter earnings, reporting $216.5 million in net income. The company's earnings per share stood at $2.38, with total revenue for the period reaching $434.6 million. This financial report was compiled using data from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Former Stifel Indie Team Managing $1 Billion Jumps to Raymond James
feed.summary: KWM Wealth Advisory, a former Stifel Independent Advisors team managing $1 billion in client assets, has moved to Raymond James Financial Services. This move follows Stifel's sale of its independent unit to Equitable Advisors in April. The team, led by Kenneth A. Sanchez, Lee S. Wolfe, Mitchell E. Kauffman, and KaNoi Lam, will operate out of Pasadena, California, and Honolulu, Hawaii, and had previously joined Stifel from Wells Fargo in 2022.

feed.title: L3Harris Announces Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common share. The dividend is payable on September 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 4, 2026. L3Harris is described as a "Trusted Disruptor in defense tech," providing end-to-end technology solutions across various domains for national security.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (HIG) The Hartford Insurance Group, Inc. Posts Q2 Adjusted EPS $3.42 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $3.16
feed.summary: The Hartford Insurance Group, Inc. (HIG) reported Q2 adjusted EPS of $3.42 per share, surpassing FactSet's estimated $3.16. This positive earnings flash indicates a stronger financial performance than analysts expected for the quarter.

feed.title: Deckers Buys Back $338 Million of Shares in Three Months
feed.summary: Deckers Brands announced strong financial results for the first fiscal quarter of 2027, with revenue exceeding $1 billion for the first time, marking a 5.7% increase. This growth was driven by the continued strong performance of its HOKA and UGG brands. The company also repurchased approximately $338.2 million worth of shares and raised its full-year diluted EPS guidance.

feed.title: PPL Corp (NYSE: PPL) director awarded 1,228.243 DDCP stock units
feed.summary: PPL Corp director Kenneth Michael Hartwick reported the acquisition of 1,228.243 Stock Units (DDCP) on July 22, 2026, at a reference value of $35.62 per unit. These deferred compensation units, which include reinvested dividends, will be paid out in common stock after his retirement under the company's Directors Deferred Compensation Plan. This transaction has been filed with the SEC as a Form 4.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated Declares Quarterly Cash Dividends On Its Common and Preferred Stocks
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated announced that its Board of Directors has declared quarterly cash dividends on both its common stock and six series of preferred stock. The common stock dividend remains unchanged at $0.155 per share and is payable on October 1, 2026. Dividends for the preferred stocks are also scheduled, with most payable on October 15, 2026, and one series on November 20, 2026.

feed.title: Huntington declares payouts for seven preferred-stock series
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares (Nasdaq: HBAN) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.155 per common share, consistent with the previous quarter, payable on October 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on September 17, 2026. The Board also declared quarterly cash dividends for seven series of its preferred stocks (Series B, F, G, H, J, K, and L), with most preferred dividends payable on October 15, 2026, and Series L on November 20, 2026. This announcement details the specific per-share and per-depositary share equivalents for each preferred stock series.

feed.title: Allegion plc SEC Filing (Jul 23, 2026)
feed.summary: This article details an SEC Form 144 filing by Allegion plc (ALLE) on July 23, 2026. The filing indicates a proposed sale of 687 ordinary shares acquired through the exercise of stock options, with an aggregate market value of $106,485. The sale is to be handled by UBS Financial Services Inc. and is scheduled for the same date on the NYSE.

feed.title: ‘AI Won’t Replace FAs, But Advisors Using AI Will’: Raymond James CEO Says
feed.summary: Raymond James CEO Paul Shoukry emphasizes the firm's strategic investment in AI to enhance financial advisors' capabilities and client relationships, stating that "AI won’t replace advisors, but advisors who use AI will replace advisors who do not use AI." The firm launched its proprietary AI agent, RAImond, and an AI Academy, which have seen high adoption and satisfaction rates. These AI initiatives are part of a larger $1.1 billion annual technology investment, primarily aimed at the Private Client Group, and are expected to yield significant long-term ROI despite initial integration costs.

feed.title: Barry Zwarenstein of FROG (FROG) plans 1,250-share NASDAQ stock sale
feed.summary: Barry Zwarenstein plans to sell 1,250 shares of FROG (JFrog Ltd) common stock, valued at $100,125.00, through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC on NASDAQ, with the sale expected on July 23, 2026. These shares are related to restricted stock awards from previous grants. Zwarenstein has also reported prior sales of 1,250 shares on June 8, 2026, for $105,437.50, and on May 1, 2026, for $61,250.00.

feed.title: Intel Forecast Shatters Estimates, Fueled by Data Center Growth
feed.summary: Intel Corp. has issued a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the current period, exceeding analyst estimates. The company anticipates sales between $15.8 billion and $16.8 billion for the third quarter. This positive outlook is attributed to a surge in data center spending, which is helping to drive the chipmaker's turnaround.
